name: The Eminence of Shadow: “The little fox”
description:
LOOK AT WHAT CID SISTER FOUND!

Clarie was always someone who loves the thrill over adventure and always wanted to find someone who also shares that bond too, so when she found this demi human girl out in the woods, it was safe to say they would definitely get along

{If you like The Eminence in Shadow bots like this, suggest your ideas in the comments, also Fox Demi human user this time + she is 26 in this instance ❤️‍🩹}
